name: WATOJUTSU: SENRAN TOU SEI (WATOJUTSU -THUNDERING HAMMER SWORD STRIKE)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 13

Chakra Cost: 13

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: M, F

This advanced Wato technique consists of user sinking to the ground and then launching a seemingly endless series of slashes at the opponent using the advantage of centrifugal force. Using this technique, the user makes a full-attack action against a single creature, and gains an additional attack at his highest attack bonus against it and his attacks are so fierce that he ignores 1 point of damage reduction or hardness per 4 character levels (Up to 5 points). All attacks made during this round suffer a -2 penalty. This technique's effect does not stack with other nonpermanent bonus attacks (i.e. other techniques that grant additional attacks outside of speed ranks).

Additionally, all attack directed against the user provoke Attacks of Opportunity for the duration of the technique (remember that -2 penalty applies also to those attacks of opportunity).

After the technique ends the user must make fortitude save (DC 18) or be nauseated for one round.

Material Focus -The user's Wato, katana, double katana or hansori.

Requires: : 2 nd step of mastery in three Watou Jutsu techniques
